description: Full observability for the signoz-demo Order Service: HTTP API metrics, SQLite DB call metrics, business metrics (orders/errors), and external call stubs — built on OTel traces + custom OTLP metrics.
title: signoz-demo — Order Service (Full)

var-env.name: deployment.environment
var-env.queryValue: SELECT JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment') AS `deployment.environment` FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4_1day WHERE (metric_name = 'signoz_calls_total') AND (unix_milli >= (toUnixTimestamp(now() - toIntervalDay(1)) * 1000)) GROUP BY `deployment.environment`

widgets.description: Requests per second per operation — server spans only.
widgets.title: Request Rate (RPS)

widgets.description: Fraction of server spans with STATUS_CODE_ERROR.
widgets.title: HTTP Error Rate (%)

widgets.description: P95 and P50 request latency per operation from signoz_latency.bucket.
widgets.title: P95 Latency — HTTP (ms)

widgets.description: Table of all operations: call count, P50, P95, and error count from traces.
widgets.title: Top HTTP Endpoints — Calls / P50 / P95 / Errors

widgets.description: Rate of successfully created orders from orders_created_total.
widgets.title: Orders Created — Rate

widgets.description: Rate of CreateOrder failures from order_errors_total.
widgets.title: Order Errors — Rate by Error Type

widgets.description: End-to-end latency of the CreateOrder use case — P95 and P50 from order_create_duration_seconds.
widgets.title: Order Create Duration — P50 / P95 (s)

widgets.description: P95 latency of SQLite operations by db.operation from db_operation_duration_seconds.
widgets.title: DB Operation Latency — P95 (s)

widgets.description: Call rate split by db.operation and db.status (ok|error) from db_calls_total.
widgets.title: DB Calls — Rate by Operation & Status

widgets.description: Rate of SQLite errors per operation type from db_errors_total.
widgets.title: DB Errors — Rate by Operation

widgets.description: Rate of rows written to SQLite (INSERT) from db_rows_affected_total.
widgets.title: DB Rows Affected — Rate (Writes)

widgets.description: Rate of rows read from SQLite SELECT operations from db_rows_returned_total.
widgets.title: DB Rows Returned — Rate (Reads)

widgets.description: Fraction of DB spans with hasError=true grouped by dbName — from trace data.

filter.expression: dbSystem EXISTS AND serviceName = 'signoz-demo-order-service' AND hasError = 'true' AND dbName EXISTS
dbSystem EXISTS AND serviceName = 'signoz-demo-order-service' AND dbName EXISTS

widgets.title: DB Error Rate (Traces)

widgets.description: The 10 slowest DB spans ordered by duration — from trace data.
widgets.title: Slowest DB Calls (Top 10)

widgets.description: P95 latency of outbound HTTP/gRPC calls from external_call_duration_seconds. Populates once external calls are wired.
widgets.title: External Call Latency — P95 (s)

widgets.description: Call rate from external_calls_total split by external.target, http.method, http.status_code.
widgets.title: External Calls — Rate by Target & Status

widgets.description: Rate of failed outbound calls from external_call_errors_total.
widgets.title: External Call Errors — Rate by Target
